fetch_method: public Replicate API reference page; no prediction created

enable_pbr.description: Enable PBR (Physically Based Rendering) material generation.
enable_pbr.title: Enable Pbr

face_count.description: Number of faces (polygons) in the generated 3D model.
face_count.title: Face Count

generate_type.description: Type of 3D generation. 'Normal' generates textured model, 'Geometry' generates white model without textures (EnablePBR has no effect).
generate_type.title: generate_type

image.description: Input image to convert to 3D. Either prompt OR image must be provided, but not both. Recommendations: simple background, no text, single object, object occupies >50% of frame. Supported formats: jpg, png, jpeg, webp. Resolution: 128-5000px per side, max 6MB.
image.title: Image

prompt.description: Text description of the 3D model to generate. Either prompt OR image must be provided, but not both. Supports up to 1024 characters.
prompt.title: Prompt
